transcript:
Agent Reese: Hi! T-Mobile support, Reese speaking. What can I do for you?
Customer Alex: Hi, I need help with incorrect charge.
Customer: I see a $35 fee I don't recognize.
Agent: I’m reviewing your last bill… it looks like an activation fee on 10/15.
Customer: I upgraded online; I thought it was waived.
Agent: I can apply a one-time courtesy credit and note your account.
Agent Reese: I've taken care of that. Anything else I can help with?
Customer Alex: That fixed it. Appreciate your help!

Agent Kendall: Hi! T-Mobile support, Kendall speaking. What can I do for you?
Customer Sam: I'm having trouble with dropped calls.
Customer: Calls keep dropping after 2 minutes.
Agent: I see recent handoff failures between sectors A and B.
Customer: Can you fix it?
Agent: I’ll file a field optimization request and apply a service credit.
Agent Kendall: I've taken care of that. Anything else I can help with?
Customer Sam: Nope, that's all. Thanks so much!

Agent Kendall: Hi! T-Mobile support, Kendall speaking. What can I do for you?
Customer Casey: Hi, I need help with no service / outage.
Customer: My phone shows no service at home.
Agent: There’s a tower maintenance window in your ZIP causing an outage.
Customer: When will it be back?
Agent: ETA is ~2 hours; I’ll add an outage credit to your account.
Agent Kendall: I've opened a ticket and we'll follow up. Anything else?
Customer Casey: That's fine, thanks.

Agent Reese: Hi! T-Mobile support, Reese speaking. What can I do for you?
Customer Jordan: I'm having trouble with plan change.
Customer: I want to move to a cheaper plan.
Agent: I can switch you to Essentials—same lines, lower cost.
Customer: Will I lose hotspot?
Agent: You’ll keep 3GB hotspot; I’ll text the plan summary.
Agent Reese: That change is complete. Do you need anything else today?
Customer Jordan: Nope, that's all. Thanks so much!

Agent Chris: Hi! T-Mobile support, Chris speaking. What can I do for you?
Customer Alex: Hi, I need help with profile update.
Customer: I need to change my address.
Agent: I’ve updated your service and billing addresses.
Customer: Will shipping pick that up?
Agent: Yes, I’ve synced the change to logistics.
Agent Chris: I've taken care of that. Anything else I can help with?
Customer Alex: Nope, that's all. Thanks so much!

Agent Avery: Hi! T-Mobile support, Avery speaking. What can I do for you?
Customer Jordan: Hi, I need help with no service / outage.
Customer: My phone shows no service at home.
Agent: There’s a tower maintenance window in your ZIP causing an outage.
Customer: When will it be back?
Agent: ETA is ~2 hours; I’ll add an outage credit to your account.
Agent Avery: I've taken care of that. Anything else I can help with?
Customer Jordan: Nope, that's all. Thanks so much!

Agent Avery: Thanks for calling T-Mobile, this is Avery. How can I help today?
Customer Riley: Hi, I need help with autopay setup.
Customer: I want to turn on AutoPay with my bank.
Agent: I can enable that and verify the routing and account numbers.
Customer: Will I get the AutoPay discount?
Agent: Yes, the $5 line discount starts next cycle.
Agent Avery: That change is complete. Do you need anything else today?
Customer Riley: That fixed it. Appreciate your help!

Agent Chris: Thanks for calling T-Mobile, this is Chris. How can I help today?
Customer Alex: I'm having trouble with incorrect charge.
Customer: I see a $35 fee I don't recognize.
Agent: I’m reviewing your last bill… it looks like an activation fee on 10/15.
Customer: I upgraded online; I thought it was waived.

Agent Chris: I've taken care of that. Anything else I can help with?
Customer Alex: That fixed it. Appreciate your help!

Agent Reese: Thanks for calling T-Mobile, this is Reese. How can I help today?

Customer: Calls keep dropping after 2 minutes.
Agent: I see recent handoff failures between sectors A and B.
Customer: Can you fix it?
Agent: I’ll file a field optimization request and apply a service credit.
Agent Reese: That change is complete. Do you need anything else today?
Customer Casey: That fixed it. Appreciate your help!

Agent Jamie: Thanks for calling T-Mobile, this is Jamie. How can I help today?
Customer Jordan: Hi, I need help with activation.
Customer: New phone won’t activate.
Agent: Let’s scan the IMEI and pair the line—please restart the device.
Customer: It’s back on. Still no bars.
Agent: Pushing a provisioning refresh; try one more reboot.
Agent Jamie: I've taken care of that. Anything else I can help with?
Customer Jordan: Nope, that's all. Thanks so much!

Agent Kendall: Hi! T-Mobile support, Kendall speaking. What can I do for you?
Customer Alex: Hi, I need help with device not powering on.
Customer: My phone won’t turn on.
Agent: Hold power + volume for 15 seconds to force restart.
Customer: Okay—logo appeared.
Agent: Great. I’ll also run a battery health check on the line.
Agent Kendall: I've opened a ticket and we'll follow up. Anything else?
Customer Alex: That's fine, thanks.

Agent Avery: Thanks for calling T-Mobile, this is Avery. How can I help today?
Customer Casey: I'm having trouble with dropped calls.
Customer: Calls keep dropping after 2 minutes.
Agent: I see recent handoff failures between sectors A and B.

Agent: I’ll file a field optimization request and apply a service credit.

Customer Casey: That fixed it. Appreciate your help!

Customer Jordan: I'm having trouble with password reset.
Customer: I forgot my account password.
Agent: I’ll send a reset link and can verify your PIN by SMS.
Customer: Got it. Reset complete.
Agent: Please sign back in and enable recovery options.
Agent Reese: I've opened a ticket and we'll follow up. Anything else?
Customer Jordan: That's fine, thanks.

Agent Kendall: Thanks for calling T-Mobile, this is Kendall. How can I help today?
Customer Alex: Hi, I need help with sim / esim.
Customer: I want to switch to eSIM.
Agent: I’ll generate a QR code—open Settings > Cellular > Add eSIM.
Customer: It says activation failed.
Agent: I’m reissuing the profile; please try scanning again.
Agent Kendall: I scheduled a callback once it's resolved. Is there anything else?
Customer Alex: That's fine, thanks.

Agent Kendall: Thanks for calling T-Mobile, this is Kendall. How can I help today?
Customer Sam: I'm having trouble with refund status.
Customer: I returned a device last week.
Agent: I see the RMA received; refunds post in 3–5 business days.
Customer: Can you email a confirmation?
Agent: Absolutely, I’ve sent the receipt to your address on file.
Agent Kendall: I've taken care of that. Anything else I can help with?
Customer Sam: Nope, that's all. Thanks so much!

Customer Morgan: That fixed it. Appreciate your help!

Agent Avery: Hi! T-Mobile support, Avery speaking. What can I do for you?
Customer Casey: Hi, I need help with slow data.
Customer: My data is crawling in the afternoons.
Agent: I’m checking your area—heavy congestion near a stadium today.
Customer: Is there anything I can do?
Agent: Try LTE fallback for now; I’ve also prioritized your ticket to engineering.
Agent Avery: I've taken care of that. Anything else I can help with?
Customer Casey: That fixed it. Appreciate your help!

Agent Drew: Hi! T-Mobile support, Drew speaking. What can I do for you?
Customer Riley: Hi, I need help with two-factor.
Customer: My 2FA code isn’t arriving.
Agent: Let’s re-register your device and check SMS filtering.
Customer: Code came through this time.
Agent: I’ve added backup codes to your profile.
Agent Drew: I scheduled a callback once it's resolved. Is there anything else?
Customer Riley: Sounds good, I'll wait for the update.

Agent Chris: Hi! T-Mobile support, Chris speaking. What can I do for you?
Customer Jordan: I'm having trouble with international roaming.
Customer: I’m traveling to Spain next week.
Agent: Your plan includes data; I’ll enable international day pass for voice.
Customer: How much is it per day?
Agent: $5/day when used; I’ll add usage alerts.
Agent Chris: I've opened a ticket and we'll follow up. Anything else?
